data.raceComments: {"comment":"5. LORD OF THE SUN has been good since resuming off a 462-day spell at the start of this campaign. Hasn't struck through yet but has been threatening. Drops back to a sprint off 34 days and is great chance to break through if he puts it all together. 2. SNATCHREILLY backs up quickly from Tamworth when missing by a neck. Keeps a claimer on to help under the big weight and is drawn much kinder. Have to take serious. 8. PROVENCAL was a big improver second-up when just missing the frame at Wellington. Strips fitter third-up on quick back-up and is among the key chances. 1. SOOBOOCO came up just short here last time when sent out at a big price. If he holds his form, he can cause another scare.","runners":[5,2,8,1],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: ARMIDALE-R7-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
